$comment: Release artifact contract — defines expected assets, checksums, signing, and local verification state per release channel. The local post-upload audit should verify the published release matches this contract.

artifacts.name: LibreSpot.exe
artifacts.description: PS2EXE compiled PowerShell script (single-file, requires admin)

artifacts.name: LibreSpot.ps1
artifacts.description: Raw PowerShell script for iex one-liner installs

artifacts.name: LibreSpot.sbom.cdx.json
artifacts.description: CycloneDX SBOM for the WPF desktop shell

artifacts.name: checksums.txt
artifacts.description: SHA256 checksums for all release assets (sha256sum format)

artifacts.name: librespot-release-manifest.json
artifacts.description: Machine-readable release manifest with per-artifact SHA256, size, RID, and role for package-manager automation

attestationContract.reason: The repository intentionally does not track GitHub Actions build workflows. Local release builds publish checksums and SBOM files, but they do not currently produce GitHub provenance attestations.

postUploadAudit.description: After gh release upload, the local release audit should verify the published release matches this contract.
checks: Every artifact with required=true exists exactly once in the release assets
checksums.txt contains one entry per coveredAsset
Prerelease flag matches releaseFlags for the tag channel
No non-draft release is overwritten without explicit operator override
LibreSpot.sbom.cdx.json exists when the SBOM artifact is required
librespot-release-manifest.json records each artifact role, size, SHA256, RID, and build mode
postUploadAudit.notes: The post-upload step runs from the maintainer machine with gh release view --json after assets are uploaded. The repository intentionally does not track GitHub Actions build workflows, so provenance attestations are not part of the current local release contract.

historicalReleases.description: Releases before this contract was introduced do not conform to it.
historicalReleases.notes: v3.7.2 ships only checksums.txt, LibreSpot.exe, LibreSpot.ps1. v4.0.0-preview.1 ships only LibreSpot-v4.0.0-preview.1.exe. These releases predate the WPF desktop exe, CLI exe, SBOM, and release-manifest requirements.
